rationale: The cited paper’s core contribution is a cognitive model of usage estimation in flat-fee versus pay-per-use decisions, and the citing paper’s core contribution is modeling plan choice with endogenous and uncertain usage under multipart tariffs. That strong construct overlap (usage self-prediction, tariff choice, break-even/overage context) makes the citation plausibly a theory/mechanism source rather than an incidental mention. Given this and a confirmed DOI-level match, this pair should be kept for second-stage judgment.
